Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All measured parameters are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated LDL cholesterol (103 mg/dL; upper limit 100 mg/dL). Glycemic control, renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile are otherwise unremarkable. Recommend monitoring LDL and considering lifestyle modification or further cardiovascular risk assessment as appropriate. No acute laboratory concerns.
Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil
